mapper.sql: SELECT a.sess_log_sn, a.net_se_cd , a.lgn_se_cd , a.srvc_user_id , a.rqstr_ip_addr, a.cntn_se_no, a.cntn_ocrn_dt, a.cntn_dtl_expln, a.cert_token_vl, a.token_crt_hr , a.task_se_cd, a.srvc_nm , a.flfmt_hr , a.sess_expry_prnmnt_hr, a.lgt_dt, a.reg_dt , a.rgtr_id , a.mdfcn_dt , a.mdfr_id FROM kids_own.tb_ca_l_sesn_log_info_mng a WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY a.rgtr_id DESC
mapper.select: with userInfo AS( select AA.mbr_id from( select mi.mbr_id from kids_own.tb_pp_m_mbr_info mi where mi.mbr_id = #{srvcUserId} and mi.mbr_whdwl_dt is null union all select mni.emp_no as mbr_id from kids_own.tb_pp_m_mngr_info mni where mni.emp_no = #{srvcUserId} ) AA limit 1 ) select COALESCE(MAX(lm.sess_log_sn),0) FROM kids_own.tb_ca_l_sesn_log_info_mng lm INNER JOIN userInfo u ON u.mbr_id = lm.srvc_user_id WHERE lm.lgn_se_cd = #{lgnSeCd} AND lm.cntn_se_no = '1'
